description: Daily Briefing Generator: Gather calendar, email, task, and Slack data simultaneously, then compile into a structured daily briefing

agents.name: calendar-agent
agents.role: Fetch today's calendar events and generate meeting preparation notes

agents.name: gmail-agent
agents.role: Scan unread emails and prioritize by urgency and importance

agents.name: notion-agent
agents.role: Pull tasks due today from Notion and organize by priority

agents.name: slack-agent
agents.role: Gather overnight Slack mentions and channel highlights

agents.name: briefing-lead
agents.role: Synthesize all gathered data into a structured daily briefing and publish to Notion
